body:
Continuation of PR #122, which I accidentally caused to be merged into `master` when bors succeeded. I can't re-open that PR, but I requested to revert the merge in PR #134 .

The only addition this PR makes to #122 is updating packages, specifically updating EnsembleKalmanProcesses from 0.2.0 to 0.5.x (current as of this PR). A critical bug (CliMA/EnsembleKalmanProcesses.jl#104) was fixed in EKP v0.2.1.
title: Use EKP.jl 0.5.x
